* Sometimes using ladders, dust and washes furniture, walls, machines, and equipment; cleans ceilings and dust and polishes light fixtures
* Moves cabinets, boxes, furniture, crates, and equipment to clean areas, either manually or by using hand trucks
* May remove stains from such surfaces as rugs, drapes, walls, and floors using chemicals and cleaning solutions
* Strips, seals, finishes, and polishes floors
* Cleans and vacuums carpeted areas, including the application of spot cleaning treatment
* Gathers and empties trash

* Must keep janitor’s closet neat and orderly and maintain equipment in good working order
* Requisitions supplies and equipment needed for cleaning and maintenance duties
* Monitors building security and safety by performing such tasks as locking doors after operating hours and possibly checking electrical appliance use to ensure that hazards are not created
* Miscellaneous duties as assigned

**Requirements:**

* Hands on experience in a similar role

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Drivers license
* Used to a working in a high security environment

description:
Milano, Italy


Full\-time


People


  
**Who we are**
--------------


Glovo is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 70 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.


### **Job Description**


If you’re here, it’s because you’re looking for an **exciting ride**.


A ride that will fuel up your ambitions to take on a **new challenge and stretch yourself beyond your comfort zone.**


We’ll deliver a **non\-vanilla culture built on talent, where we work to amplify the impact on millions of people**, paving the way forward together.

**Not your usual app**. We are the fastest\-growing multi\-category app connecting millions of users with businesses, and couriers, offering on\-demand services from more than 170,000 local restaurants, grocers and supermarkets, and high street retail stores. We operate in more than 1500 cities across 23 countries.


Together we revolutionise the way people connect with their everyday needs, from delivering essentials to connecting our ecosystem of users through innovative solutions powered by technology. For us, every day is filled with purpose.

**What makes our ride unique?**

**Our culture and strong values.**

**Our career development philosophy.**

**Our commitment to being a force for good.**  



We have a vision: **Building the largest marketplace in your city, to give access to anything in minutes****.** And this is where your ride starts.

**YOUR MISSION**


We’re looking for a **Health \& Safety Lead** to join our People team in **Italy**. If you thrive in fast\-paced environments, are passionate about safety culture, regulatory excellence, and have the ability to lead both processes and people, this is your place!


You will play a crucial role in ensuring compliance with Italian health \& safety legislation, developing and implementing local processes, and managing internal and external stakeholders, all while fostering a safe and productive work environment.

**THE JOURNEY**

* Manage and control all Health and Safety matters according to **Italian law**, ensuring full **regulatory compliance**
* Serve as the company's **RSPP (Responsabile del Servizio di Prevenzione e Protezione)**, taking ownership of all related legal responsibilities
* Lead and ensure proper documentation and records management to support labor inspections
* Create, implement, and continuously improve **H\&S processes and protocols** at both technical and organizational levels
* Lead or support the **investigation of occupational incidents**, identifying root causes and recommending corrective actions
* Develop and deliver **H\&S training programs** and track completion rates across the organization
* Coordinate **health surveillance programs** in accordance with applicable regulations
* Manage **emergency planning**, including the design and implementation of evacuation procedures
* Handle **Coordination of Business Activities (Coordinamento delle Attività Imprenditoriali – D.Lgs. 81/08 Art. 26\)** and liaise with contractors and third\-party providers
* Provide clear guidance and support to stakeholders, including leadership, on H\&S matters
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including Facilities, Operations, and Legal, to integrate safety into all areas of the business
* **Mentor and guide** one junior H\&S resource, supporting their professional growth


### **Qualifications**


**WHAT YOU WILL BRING TO THE RIDE**

* **RSPP Qualification** in accordance with Italian legislation (D.Lgs. 81/08\)
* Strong knowledge of **Italian H\&S regulations** and experience applying them in a corporate or operational environment
* Proven experience in **creating and implementing Health \& Safety processes**
* Solid track record of **stakeholder management**, including communication with leadership and external authorities
* Experience working in **high\-pressure, fast\-paced environments**, preferably in logistics, manufacturing, or tech/startup industries
* Demonstrated experience in:
	+ Accident investigation
	+ Emergency planning
	+ CAE platforms (Coordinamento Attività Esterne)
	+ Risk assessment and mitigation planning
	+ Work inspections
* Strong organizational and analytical skills
* Hands\-on attitude and the ability to work independently
* **Professional proficiency in English** (written and spoken)
* Comfortable with travel and site visits across Italy as needed
* Advanced **Excel / Google Sheets skills**; experience with JavaScript for automation or reporting is a strong plus


Individuals representing diverse profiles, **and abilities,** encompassing various genders, ethnicities, and backgrounds, are less likely to apply for this role if they do not possess solid experience in 100% of these areas. Even if it seems you don't meet our musts don't let it stop you, we are all about finding the best talent out there! **Skills can be learned, and embracing diversity is invaluable.**

**We believe driven talent deserves:**

* An enticing equity plan that lets you own a piece of the action.
* Top\-notch private health insurance to keep you at your peak.
* Monthly Glovo credit to satisfy your cravings!
* ️ Extra time off, the freedom to work from home two days a week, and the opportunity to work from anywhere for up to three weeks a year!
* Enhanced parental leave
* Online therapy and wellbeing benefits to ensure your mental well\-being.


Here at Glovo, we thrive on diversity, we believe it enhances our teams, products, and culture. We know that the best ideas come from a mashup of brilliant diverse minds. This is why we are committed to providing equal opportunities to talent from all backgrounds \- all genders, racial/diverse backgrounds, abilities, ages, sexual orientations and all other unique characteristics that make you YOU. We will encourage you to bring your authentic self to work, fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels heard.


Feel free to note your pronouns in your application (e.g., she/her/hers, he/him/his, they/them/theirs, etc).

**So, ready to take the wheel and make this the ride of your life?**


Delve into our culture by taking a peek at our Instagram and check out our Linkedin and website!

title: Senior Azure Architect
description:

* Are you excited by designing Azure architectures that enable real business transformation?
* Do you enjoy partnering with customers to turn complex requirements into secure, scalable cloud solutions?

As an **Azure Architect**, you will play a key role in helping our customers modernise, migrate, and accelerate their cloud journeys. Working closely with both technical and business stakeholders, you will design customer‑centric Azure architectures that are secure, scalable, and aligned with strategic goals.
You will provide architectural leadership across cloud strategy engagements and migration initiatives, while also identifying opportunities to optimise and expand Azure services to deliver long‑term value for our customers. **Key Responsibilities**

* Design and deliver scalable, secure, and high‑performing Azure architectures

* Lead architectural assessments, design reviews, and decision‑making throughout the project lifecycle
* Guide the migration of applications and workloads from on‑premises or hybrid environments to Azure

Join us and be part of a purpose\-driven culture where your ideas matter, your growth is supported, and your career can go global.*

At SoftwareOne, we are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and teammates without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws. Additionally, we encourage experienced individuals that have taken an intentional career break and are now prepared to return to work to explore our SOAR program.

description:

Risk Data Aggregation \& Risk Reporting Associate

**Your Perspectives:**


Il team Risk Capital \& Reporting affianca i clienti finanziari nella gestione integrata dei rischi e del capitale, combinando competenze quantitative, regolamentari e di reporting, con focus su capital management, framework di Enterprise Risk, analisi degli impatti normativi sul business e sviluppo di soluzioni per il monitoraggio e la misurazione dei rischi. In particolare, all’interno del nostro team prenderai parte a progetti di disegno e realizzazione di framework di misurazione, gestione e reporting dei rischi per Gruppi Bancari, Assicurativi ed Enti attivi nell’Asset \& Wealth Management, lavorando a stretto contatto con professionisti esperti sul cliente, sia on\-site sia da remoto. Entra nel nostro team e avrai l’opportunità di:

* Supportare attività di analisi normativa in ambito regolamentare (es. framework Basilea), contribuendo a progetti di Regulatory Reporting e Regulatory Strategy.
* Partecipare a progetti di trasformazione in ambito Risk, supportando i clienti nella gestione di iniziative complesse di Change Management.
* Contribuire alla definizione di modelli di Governance e al miglioramento dei processi organizzativi.
* Supportare il coordinamento e l’avanzamento progettuale attraverso un approccio strutturato e flessibile di Project Management.
 **Your****unique****strengths**

* Hai conseguito una laurea con un background in ambito finanziario, economico\-statistico o ingegneristico.
* Possiedi comprovata esperienza da 1 a 3 anni in Aziende Leader e/o in primarie Società di consulenza, con riferimento al Framework di risk reporting (RDARR/BCBS239\) e/o con conoscenza base dei principi Data Governance.
* Hai un'ottima conoscenza del Pacchetto Office (Excel, Power Point, ...).
* Hai una conoscenza base di linguaggi di programmazione (es. SAS /Python).
* Parli e scrivi in inglese fluentemente.
* Sei unə team worker e possiedi buone capacità relazionali e comunicative.
 **Set****your****expectation****higher**


PwC ti sorprenderà con un’opportunità di carriera che ti farà sentire al centro della società, dell’innovazione e del cambiamento. Il talento e la curiosità avranno tutto lo spazio che meritano e contribuirai a garantire la qualità dei servizi che offriamo al nostro interno. In questo percorso di crescita ti supporterà un team esperto e avrai una formazione continua e su misura grazie con la quale potrai mettere le tue competenze a disposizione della clientela interna.

 **Feel****at****home**


Ci prendiamo cura delle nostre persone, abbracciando le diversità e creando valore per la clientela, le persone e la comunità, nel rispetto dell'ambiente.


GIVE YOUR LIFE A DIFFERENT PERSPECTIVE

title: Medical Science Liasion - MSL
description:
**Sinclair is Hiring! Join Our Team as Medical Science Liasion**


As part of our continued expansion in Southern Europe, we are seeking an experienced and entrepreneurial Medical Science Liaison (MSL) to strengthen scientific engagement with key opinion leaders (KOLs), support medical education initiatives, and contribute to the successful growth of our injectable aesthetics portfolio.


The role is field\-based and focused on building trusted scientific relationships with healthcare professionals, aesthetic physicians, dermatologists, plastic surgeons, and other key stakeholders. The MSL serves as the scientific expert for Sinclair’s injectable aesthetics portfolio.


This is a non\-promotional Medical Affairs position: the MSL engages in balanced, peer\-to\-peer scientific exchange and is distinct from a sales role. The Medical Science Liaison (MSL) will serve as the scientific expert for the company’s injectable aesthetic products across Italy and/or Spain. The ideal candidate will bring strong experience in medical aesthetics, specifically injectables (e.g., HA fillers, botulinum toxin, biostimulators), combined with solid field medical experience and excellent communication skills.

**Role Responsibilities**

**Scientific \& Medical Engagement**

* Develop and maintain scientific relationships with Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs), injectors, dermatologists, plastic surgeons, and aesthetic clinics.
* Deliver high\-quality scientific presentations on clinical data, mechanism of action, and safety, tailored to the audience.
* Identify potential opportunities for investigator\-initiated studies (IIS), publications, and evidence\-generation activities.
* Support investigator\-initiated studies, advisory boards, and medical education activities.
* Provide scientific and clinical support to commercial and training teams while ensuring compliance with local regulations.
* Respond to unsolicited medical inquiries from healthcare professionals.

**Field Activities**

* Conduct regular field visits across assigned territories in Italy and/or Spain to maintain high\-quality scientific engagement..
* Attend national and international congresses, workshops, and scientific meetings related to aesthetic medicine.
* Collect, analyze, and communicate actionable medical insights and competitive intelligence to internal stakeholders to support strategic decision\-making.Collaborate cross\-functionally with Medical Affairs, Marketing, Clinical, and Sales teams.
* Support product launches and lifecycle management activities from a Medical Affairs perspective.

**Compliance \& Medical Excellence**

* Ensure all activities are conducted in accordance with local regulations, industry codes, EU MDR requirements, and internal SOPs.Maintain high scientific standards and remain updated on trends and innovations in aesthetic injectables.
* Document scientific interactions and field insights accurately and compliantly.

**Required Experience**

* Advanced degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Medicine, or a related scientific discipline (MD, PharmD, PhD, MSc or equivalent).
* Minimum 2 years of experience in a Medical Science Liaison, Clinical Specialist, Medical Advisor, or similar field\-based medical role.
* Mandatory experience in medical aesthetics injectables, including: Hyaluronic acid fillers, Botulinum toxin,Collagen stimulators / biostimulators
* Strong relationship\-building and stakeholder engagement capabilities
* Strategic mindset with the ability to generate and communicate field insights
* High level of scientific credibility and professionalism
* Excellent presentation and facilitation skills
* Ability to work independently in a dynamic field\-based environment
* Cross\-functional collaboration and business acumen
* Fluent in English and either Italian or Spanish.
* Willingness to travel extensively within the assigned territory.
* Strong commitment to compliance with the relevant rules and procedures, and to scientific quality and integrity.

**Good to have:**

* Existing network within the aesthetic medicine community in Italy or Spain.
* Experience supporting product launches and medical education programs.
* Experience in scientific communication, publications, or congress activity, with the ability to translate clinical data into clear narratives.
* Proven field experience interacting with aesthetic physicians and KOLs

**About Sinclair**


Founded in 1971, Sinclair is a global medical aesthetics organisation, that delivers an extensive product range. With an in\-house commercial infrastructure, including manufacturing and a network of distributors in leading global markets, our products are sold in 55 countries worldwide.


This is a great time to join Sinclair as we continue to increase our product range and expand into new markets and territories.

##### **Sinclair Values:**


**Act with Integrity** Consistently doing the right thing even when it’s the hard choice; 100% Compliance with all rules, standard operating procedures and guidelines  

**Results\-Driven** Make a business impact in all you do, whether sales, efficiency, operational excellence; it should make a meaningful impact  

**One Company, One Goal** Working towards unified mission, we are all Sinclair and be seen by customers as one company in every way


**Own It!** Be Accountable for your decisions, actions and consequences; Be Reliable to your customers and colleagues

**We have a real focus on developing our people, and by fostering an entrepreneurial culture, we encourage flexibility, accountability and autonomy. The company is full of opportunity for those who wish to grasp it. Our people thrive on engagement, development and a varied workload. You will often be included in projects that require you to collaborate cross\-functionally.**


This is an exciting opportunity to join a successful company, with big ambitions for the future.


If this sounds like you and you meet the requirements, please apply, we would love to hear from you.


Please note if we receive a high volume of applications, we may close the role before the closing date noted.


By making this application you give consent for personal information to be used in automated decision\-making processes relating to key job requirements which are stated in this ad.

 **Sinclair does not accept speculative or unsolicited CVs from Recruitment Agencies. Any unsolicited CVs received will be treated as property of Sinclair and Terms \& Conditions associated with the use of such CVs will be considered null and void**
